decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to aggressively play low-cost creatures and burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. With cards like Grim Lavamancer, Lightning Bolt, and Incinerate, along with efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Naturalize and Seal of Fire helps deal with potential threats from the opponent, while cards like Call of the Herd provide additional creatures for the aggro strategy. Overall, this deck is designed to win the game swiftly through combat damage and burn spells.

This deck focuses on fast-paced aggression with a swarm of Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to quickly put pressure on opponents. The deck includes various Goblin support cards such as Goblin Ringleader and Goblin Warchief to maintain momentum and overwhelm opponents. Additionally, cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator provide additional utility and damage potential. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port helps to disrupt opponents' mana bases and keep them on the back foot. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless onslaught of Goblin creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through discard spells, targeted removal, and hand disruption. The deck aims to control the board with efficient creature removal and disrupt the opponent's hand with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The win condition is to chip away at the opponent's life total with creatures like Hypnotic Specter and The Rack while maintaining control of the game with cards like Cursed Scroll and Chain of Smog. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Wasteland and Dust Bowl to further disrupt the opponent's resources.

The main idea behind this deck is to utilize the Oath of Druids card to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore early in the game. This is supported by disruptive control elements such as Sphere of Resistance, Stone Rain, and Winter's Grasp to slow down the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes utility cards like Sylvan Library and Naturalize to provide card advantage and deal with threats. The manabase is built around a mix of land destruction and creature lands to maintain board presence while disrupting the opponent's resources.

The main concept of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy, while also maintaining a board presence with creatures like Ravenous Rats and Hypnotic Specter. The deck aims to control the game by utilizing removal spells such as Diabolic Edict and Engineered Plague to deal with threats. The Rack provides additional pressure on the opponent, while cards like Wasteland and Mishra's Factory help to disrupt their mana base. Overall, the deck focuses on control and disruption to outplay the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through disruption and removal spells while leveraging the powerful Oath of Druids card to cheat out large threats like Terravore early in the game. The deck also utilizes mana ramp with cards like Mox Diamond to accelerate its game plan. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Sphere of Resistance and Seal of Cleansing further enhances the control aspect of the deck, allowing it to manipulate the opponent's board while protecting its own threats. Additionally, the deck includes utility lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the powerful card advantage and board control provided by Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By establishing an early mana advantage with cards like Birds of Paradise and Fyndhorn Elves, the deck can quickly ramp into threats like Deranged Hermit and Gilded Drake while using creatures like Wall of Roots and Basking Rootwalla to protect its board state. Additionally, utilizing powerful control elements like Opposition and Tradewind Rider allows the deck to maintain dominance over the battlefield.

The deck focuses on utilizing Tinker to search for key combo pieces like Phyrexian Devourer and Altar of Dementia to set up a lethal Fling finish. Defense Grid and Tsabo's Web help protect the combo and disrupt opponents, while acceleration from cards like Mind Stone and Ancient Tomb allow for quick setup. Tangle Wire provides additional disruption, while card draw from Impulse and Fact or Fiction ensure consistency. The mana base is built to support the combo with lands like City of Traitors and Crystal Vein.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Elves, utilizing cards like Priest of Titania and Quirion Ranger to generate large amounts of mana. The strategy revolves around combining creatures with powerful abilities, such as Wirewood Symbiote and Deranged Hermit, to overwhelm the opponent with a flood of creatures. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Tangle Wire and Nantuko Vigilante to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The end goal is to combo off with cards like Kamahl, Fist of Krosa or Biorhythm to either overrun the opponent or reset the game in your favor.

The core strategy of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with various Elf creatures like Llanowar Elves and Fyndhorn Elves, while utilizing support cards like Quirion Ranger and Wirewood Symbiote. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and creature synergy, eventually closing out the game with powerful finishers like Elvish Champion and Masticore. The inclusion of cards like Survival of the Fittest and Living Wish adds versatility and consistency to the deck, allowing for strategic tutoring of key cards when needed. This deck aims to establish board dominance early and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The deck focuses on using Hermit Druid to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures, then using cards like Coffin Purge, Krosan Reclamation, and Shallow Grave to reanimate creatures for powerful combos. With cards like Survival of the Fittest and Cabal Therapy for deck manipulation and disruption, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of various utility creatures like Mesmeric Fiend and Volrath's Shapeshifter adds versatility and additional ways to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck is designed to be fast, resilient, and able to win in a variety of ways.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficiently deal with any opposing threats using a variety of removal spells. The deck includes a mix of powerful creatures, such as Exalted Angel and Call of the Herd, along with efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and Disenchant. Additionally, there are some utility cards like Sylvan Library and Dust Bowl to provide card advantage and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while controlling the opponent's board to secure victory.

The Mono Black Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's hand and board state while applying pressure with efficient creatures like Ravenous Rats and Hypnotic Specter. Utilizing cards like Duress, Cabal Therapy, and The Rack, the deck aims to control the game through discard and removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict. Mana acceleration from Dark Ritual allows for early plays, while disruption from cards like Wasteland and Cursed Scroll help to maintain control over the game. Phyrexian Arena provides card advantage, ensuring that the deck can outlast opponents in longer games.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Multani, Akroma, and Reya Dawnbringer, and then bringing them back to the battlefield with cards like Reanimate and Exhume. By using efficient mana acceleration like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual, the deck aims to get its creatures onto the battlefield before the opponent can establish a defense. With the ability to bring back multiple threats in a single turn, the deck can overwhelm the opponent with a powerful army of reanimated creatures.

The main concept of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand and resources while applying pressure with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Skittering Skirge. The deck also utilizes cards like Cursed Scroll, The Rack, and Bottomless Pit to chip away at the opponent's life total. Dark Ritual helps to power out spells ahead of schedule, while disruption spells like Duress and Smother help to control the board. Mishra's Factory and Wasteland provide additional threats and land disruption, creating a versatile and powerful control deck.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of efficient and aggressive white creatures. The deck aims to quickly build up a board presence of fast, evasive creatures like Savannah Lions and Silver Knight while using support cards like Mother of Runes and Glorious Anthem to boost their power. The inclusion of control cards like Swords to Plowshares and Cursed Scroll helps to maintain board advantage, while cards like Eternal Dragon provide late-game reach. The deck also includes some disruptive elements like Wasteland and Disenchant to deal with opposing threats.
